# Task Board

Task Board coordinates household work between humans and software agents.

Production base URL: https://task-board.oorangy.com
OpenAPI: /api/v1/openapi.json
Agent guide: /docs/agents.md
API conventions: /docs/api.md

API rules:
- Send `Authorization: Bearer $TASK_BOARD_TOKEN` on every `/api/v1` request except OpenAPI.
- Call `/api/v1/whoami` before reading or changing work; stop if the identity is unexpected.
- Never send `created_by`; the server derives it from the token.
- Read a task before updating and send its version as `If-Match: "<version>"`.
- Treat 412 as a concurrent update: fetch, reconsider, and retry rather than overwriting.
- Do not begin or complete a blocked task.
- Never place credentials or other secrets in task text or results.
